title: FadeCommand NNG payload
description: JSON payload sent inside NodeOperation.data when dispatching a fade to gradient-motiond. target='gradientengine' on the NodeOperation envelope.

command.description: Discriminator: gradient-motiond dispatches on this field.

fade_id.description: Controller-assigned unique identifier. Equals FadeCue.uuid (UUID string). Returned in fade_complete STATUS.

osc_host.description: OSC target host. Always localhost for node-side players.

osc_port.description: OSC target port. AudioCue: target_cue._osc.remote_port. VideoCue: 7000.

start_value.description: Initial level as 0.0–1.0 float. Read from target_cue's Ossia node cache at dispatch time, or 0.0 if target_cue is not yet playing.

end_value.description: Target level as 0.0–1.0 float. Derived from FadeCue.target_value / 100.0.

start_mtc_ms.description: MTC clock value in integer milliseconds at the moment of dispatch. Used by gradient-motiond to synchronise curve evaluation to the show timecode.

duration_ms.description: Fade duration in integer milliseconds. Derived from FadeCue.duration (CTimecode) via .milliseconds property.

curve_type.description: Lowercase string encoding of FadeCurveType enum value. Consumed by gradient-motiond's CurveFactory.

curve_params.description: Reserved for future curve parameterisation. Always empty object {} in Phase 6.
